overall.description: Cinematic gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a nighttime walk through a neon-drenched futuristic metropolis. The scene transitions from a busy street corner with digital billboards to a covered pedestrian walkway beneath elevated highways, following a character with distinctive red hair through the dense urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic street corner with large digital billboards

events.description: yellow taxi cab drives past from left to right across the crosswalk
group of pedestrians crosses the street from right to left

agents.ego_description: standing at the street corner observing the neon-lit surroundings and passing traffic

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi cab driving along the street past the crosswalk

entered.detail: tall building facade with large red digital advertising screens displaying animated content
white striped zebra crossing markings on the asphalt street
elevated walkways and platforms with purple and blue neon lighting

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a futuristic cyberpunk street corner dominated by a large building with prominent red digital billboards. The camera stands stationary at a crosswalk as a yellow taxi passes by and pedestrians cross the street, surrounded by towering neon-lit structures and urban architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street transitioning to covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway

events.description: camera begins walking forward and turning left to follow the sidewalk
moving from open intersection to area beneath elevated highway structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the street edge and turning left to follow the sidewalk path under the overpass

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass with blue neon strip lighting underneath
commercial storefronts with metal security grates and illuminated signage

segments.scene_description: The camera begins moving forward, turning left away from the corner building to walk along the street. The scene transitions from the open intersection to the shadow of an elevated highway structure with blue neon lighting, passing by street-level shopfronts with metal grates.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with concrete support pillars

events.description: pedestrian with distinctive bright red hair enters the frame from the left side

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the concrete overpass, approaching a pedestrian with red hair

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with bright red hair walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: large cylindrical concrete pillars supporting the overhead highway structure
metal railing separating sidewalk from vehicle lanes to the right

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway, the camera moves past massive concrete support pillars while traffic flows on the street to the right. The lighting becomes a mix of neon and shadow. Near the end of the segment, a pedestrian with distinctive red hair enters the frame from the left and begins walking ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with seating areas and vending machines

events.description: begin following the red-haired character through the covered walkway
entering plaza area with white benches and seated pedestrians

agents.ego_description: following the red-haired character through the covered pedestrian walkway, passing by individuals seated on benches

notable_agents.action: red-haired character leading the way through the covered walkway ahead

entered.detail: white concrete seating areas with people resting and socializing
red automated vending kiosks lined against the wall
tall building-mounted digital advertisement screens with colorful animated content

segments.scene_description: The camera follows the red-haired character into a covered pedestrian walkway featuring white benches where people are seated. The area is lined with red vending machines and illuminated by vertical neon billboards on the right. The environment transitions from the highway underpass to a more enclosed commercial plaza with no vehicle traffic.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open cyberpunk intersection into the shadowed depths of a covered commercial plaza. It begins at a bustling street corner dominated by towering red digital billboards and passing yellow taxis before turning left to move away from the intersection. As the camera advances, the open cityscape shifts into the oppressive shadow of an elevated highway, passing metal shopfronts and massive concrete pillars under a glow of blue neon. The scene then transitions as a red-haired pedestrian enters the frame, leading the camera away from the traffic and into a sheltered pedestrian walkway. Finally, the environment opens into an enclosed plaza lined with white benches and red vending machines, illuminated by vertical neon billboards.
